question: ¿Cuál es el valor total de la cartera vencida por ejecutiva, considerando solo el snapshot más reciente?
sql: WITH ultima_fecha AS (SELECT MAX(fecha_cartera) AS max_fecha FROM cartera), cartera_vencida AS (SELECT c.nit, SUM(CAST(ca.saldo_vencido AS DECIMAL(15,2))) AS saldo_vencido FROM cartera ca JOIN clients c ON c.nit = ca.nit WHERE ca.fecha_cartera = (SELECT max_fecha FROM ultima_fecha) AND ca.dias < 0 GROUP BY c.nit) SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, COALESCE(SUM(cv.saldo_vencido), 0) AS saldo_vencido_usd FROM executives e LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = e.email AND e.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN cartera_vencida cv ON cv.nit = c.nit GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY saldo_vencido_usd DESC;

question: ¿Cuáles son los 10 productos con mayor valor despachado en USD en 2026?
sql: SELECT p.code AS codigo, p.product_name AS referencia, SUM(par.quantity * COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0)) AS valor_usd FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026 GROUP BY p.code, p.product_name ORDER BY valor_usd DESC LIMIT 10;

question: ¿Cuántas órdenes de compra están en estado 'processing' y tienen más de 7 días sin despacho real, por ejecutiva?
sql: WITH rezagadas AS (SELECT po.id, po.client_id FROM purchase_orders po WHERE po.status = 'processing' AND po.order_creation_date <= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM partials par WHERE par.order_id = po.id AND par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL)) SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS ocs_rezagadas FROM executives e JOIN clients c ON c.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = e.email AND e.is_active = 1 JOIN rezagadas r ON r.client_id = c.id GROUP BY e.id, e.name ORDER BY ocs_rezagadas DESC;

question: ¿Cuál es el porcentaje de cumplimiento del pronóstico manual por ejecutiva en el primer trimestre de 2026 (enero a marzo)?
sql: WITH pron AS (SELECT c.executive, SUM(sf.cantidad_forecast) AS kilos_pron FROM sales_forecasts sf JOIN clients c ON c.nit = sf.nit WHERE sf.modelo = 'manual' AND sf.año = '2026' AND sf.mes IN ('ENERO','FEBRERO','MARZO') GROUP BY c.executive), reales AS (SELECT c.executive, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_real FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' JOIN clients c ON c.id = po.client_id WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-03-31' GROUP BY c.executive) SELECT e.name AS ejecutiva, COALESCE(p.kilos_pron, 0) AS kilos_pronosticados, COALESCE(r.kilos_real, 0) AS kilos_reales, ROUND(COALESCE(r.kilos_real, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.kilos_pron, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS cumplimiento_pct FROM executives e LEFT JOIN pron p ON p.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = e.email AND e.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN reales r ON r.executive COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = e.email AND e.is_active = 1 WHERE COALESCE(p.kilos_pron, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(r.kilos_real, 0) > 0 ORDER BY cumplimiento_pct ASC;

question: ¿Cuántos kilos se despacharon en 2026 por mes, comparando con el mismo mes del año anterior (2025)?
sql: WITH despachos AS (SELECT YEAR(par.dispatch_date) AS anio, MONTH(par.dispatch_date) AS mes, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) IN (2025, 2026) GROUP BY YEAR(par.dispatch_date), MONTH(par.dispatch_date)) SELECT d2026.mes, d2026.kilos AS kilos_2026, COALESCE(d2025.kilos, 0) AS kilos_2025, d2026.kilos - COALESCE(d2025.kilos, 0) AS variacion FROM (SELECT mes, kilos FROM despachos WHERE anio = 2026) d2026 LEFT JOIN (SELECT mes, kilos FROM despachos WHERE anio = 2025) d2025 ON d2025.mes = d2026.mes ORDER BY d2026.mes;

question: ¿Cuál es el fill rate (kilos despachados / kilos pedidos) por cliente en 2026, para los clientes con más de 1000 kilos pedidos?
sql: WITH pedidos AS (SELECT po.client_id, SUM(pop.quantity) AS kilos_pedidos FROM purchase_orders po JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.purchase_order_id = po.id AND pop.muestra = 0 WHERE po.status != 'cancelled' AND YEAR(po.order_creation_date) = 2026 GROUP BY po.client_id), despachados AS (SELECT po.client_id, SUM(par.quantity) AS kilos_despachados FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND YEAR(par.dispatch_date) = 2026 GROUP BY po.client_id) SELECT c.client_name, c.nit, p.kilos_pedidos, COALESCE(d.kilos_despachados, 0) AS kilos_despachados, ROUND(COALESCE(d.kilos_despachados, 0) / NULLIF(p.kilos_pedidos, 0) * 100, 2) AS fill_rate_pct FROM pedidos p JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id LEFT JOIN despachados d ON d.client_id = p.client_id WHERE p.kilos_pedidos > 1000 ORDER BY fill_rate_pct ASC;

question: ¿Cuál es el valor en COP de los despachos de mayo de 2026, usando la cascada de TRM normalizada?
sql: WITH despachos_con_trm AS (SELECT par.id, par.quantity, COALESCE(NULLIF(pop.price,0), p.price, 0) AS precio_unitario, COALESCE( CASE WHEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0) WHEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0) > 10000 THEN NULLIF(par.trm+0,0)/100 ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0) BETWEEN 3200 AND 10000 THEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0) WHEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0) > 10000 THEN NULLIF(po.trm+0,0)/100 ELSE NULL END, (SELECT td.value FROM trm_daily td WHERE td.date <= par.dispatch_date AND td.value >= 3200 ORDER BY td.date DESC LIMIT 1), 4000 ) AS trm_normalizada FROM partials par JOIN purchase_order_product pop ON pop.id = par.product_order_id AND pop.muestra = 0 JOIN products p ON p.id = pop.product_id JOIN purchase_orders po ON po.id = par.order_id AND po.status != 'cancelled' WHERE par.type = 'real' AND par.deleted_at IS NULL AND par.dispatch_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31') SELECT SUM(quantity * precio_unitario) AS valor_usd, SUM(quantity * precio_unitario * trm_normalizada) AS valor_cop FROM despachos_con_trm;
